feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Process Automation
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Process Automation Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: To enable Studio Home Application in SAP Buildworkzone
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have followed the prerequisites in the below help documentation to configure the Studio Home Application in SAP Buildworkzone.
https://help.sap.com/docs/build-process-automation/sap-build-process-automation/configure-studio-home-application?q=studio+home

However, I could not see the studio home application in the Buildworkzone. I have refreshed the HTML content manager. I don't see such application available in workzone, but the other apps like My Inbox, Visibility scenario, Process etc.
I also read the blog https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-and-automation-blog-posts/empowering-business-to-manage-decisions-in-sap-build-process-automation/ba-p/14092130

Can someone help me to figure out what I was missing? or please chare clear steps to see the Studio Home application in Buildworkzone.

entry.title: Critical: SAP Desktop Agent Randomly Disconnecting in VM – Impacting Automation Execution
entry.content:
The SAP Desktop Agent in the VM is getting disconnected automatically at random intervals, with no consistent pattern. As a result, the automation stops unexpectedly, and users are left waiting for results that won’t be generated unless someone manually logs into the VM. This is impacting the reliability of the process and needs attention urgently.

I've attached two images to illustrate the issue:

  • The first image shows the agent in a disconnected state when no one is logged into the VM.

 

  • The second image shows that once I manually log in, the agent status changes to "Disconnected->Preparing", and only then does the automation start working.

entry.title: SAP BPA Desktop Agent Installation Error : "The integrity of the version can't be checked. "
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I am facing several issues while trying to install the Desktop agent for SAP Build Process Automation.

1) I am not able to download the latest version. Its throwing below error:

2) I got the set up file from "https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/#cloud". Here the set up is failing because of the below mentioned error.

 

Kindly help me resolve the issue asap as I need the desktop agent to be installed for an POC.

Your help is highly appreciated.

 

Regards,

Sushree Suravi Bhuyan

entry.title: Email Notification in BPA
entry.content:
Hi everyone.

I have a question and would like your help.

We are currently testing BPA with the goal of automating processes (workflow).

This process was created in BPA and is made available to users through Workzone.

However, email notifications are not sent to users, informing them that new tasks are available for execution.

The only way I know to send an email is by creating a specific task to send it. But I would have to create many tasks for this. Example: I have 10 tasks in a given process, I will have to create 10 more just to send the email. Not to mention that I will not be able to include the link to access the task in the body of the email.

I would like to know if BPA has any automatic way of sending emails to the responsible users without having to create specific tasks for sending emails ("email task").

Thank you

entry.title: [SAP Build Process Automation] Desktop Agent does not synchronize deployed projects and stuck logs
entry.content:
Dear SAP Build Process Automation Community:

I'm having a persistent and very frustrating issue with my SAP Build Process Automation desktop agent. It doesn't seem to sync deployed projects despite seemingly correct configuration and several troubleshooting attempts. I would greatly appreciate any help, suggestions, or diagnostics based on your experiences.SAP Build Process Automation 

 

The core problem (with the desktop agent!):

My Desktop Agent (v3.37.57 on Windows 11) constantly displays the message "It appears no projects have been received yet" in the "Projects" window. Most worryingly, its local logs ("History/Events") are completely blocked, showing the last activity as [Exact date of capture, e.g., June 9, 2025], even though it is [Current date, e.g., June 18, 2025].

This indicates that the agent is not processing or updating its status locally, nor is it downloading projects that have been deployed.

 

Project context and configuration (Everything looks fine in the cloud!):

I've set up a project to automate the mass update of fixed asset master records in SAP S/4HANA Cloud. The cloud configuration appears to be correct:

Project: Mass Update Asset Master Data (57O).
Cloud Status: Deployed and started in RPADeveloper environment (confirmed in "Environments" > "Projects").
Automation Launcher: The Mass Update Asset Master Data (57O) artifact (Automation Launcher type) is configured with the main automation (MassUpdateAssetMasterData) in the "Start Manually from Agent" section.
Agent Connection to Cloud:
In the BTP lobby (Environments > RPADeveloper > Agent Management), my agent (NDTSCZ1166) appears as "Inactive" and "Connected".
In the agent's local settings (Configuration > Tenants), the connection to efdadad3trial.us10.process-automation.build.cloud.sap is "Active".

entry.title: Unable to add Northwind destination in SAP BUILD Apps integration
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

I have a use case wherein I wish to create a Northwind destination in cockpit and add that destination as SAP system in SAP BUILD Apps.

 

Below are my destination details:

I am able to connect successfully from cockpit.

However, When I try to add this SAP system through Integrations tab , I get below error:

On Inspect, below are the details.

Please provide your valuable thoughts on this issue.

entry.title: How can I overwrite an existing SAP Build Process Automation production project with QA changes in t
entry.content: In our SAP Business Technology Platform subaccount, we maintain two Build Process Automation projects—MiApp_QA (quality environment) and MiApp_PROD (production environment)—both within the same subaccount. Whenever we complete testing in QA, we need to apply exactly the same artifacts and deployed logic to the production project. However, the manual .mtar export/import in the UI prevents us from overwriting or renaming MiApp_PROD, and workarounds like unpacking the .mtar to edit .mtar are impractical. We are therefore seeking a native method—whether via the SAP BTP CLI, a REST API endpoint, or another SAP-recommended workflow—that allows us to update or overwrite MiApp_PROD directly with the latest version of MiApp_QA without creating a new project or performing manual package edits. Any concrete examples of commands, flags, or endpoints that enable this “overwrite” within the same subaccount would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation - Add a Document Template Error
entry.content:
I am trying to create an artifact for a Document Template in SAP Build on BTP Trial. However, when I select the option to create a Document Template, I receive the following error:

"SAP_IPA_28014: The requested Document Information Extraction service operation could not be completed."

This error is preventing the creation of the template.

I have already assigned the role 'Document_Information_Extraction_UI_Templates_Admin' to my account.

Could you please help resolve this issue?

SAP Build 
SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: How to Handle Script Task Limit Exceeded Error in process Automation for Email Body Generation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am working on an automation in SAP Build Process Automation (BPA) where we need to fetch data from an API and include it in the body of an email. Without the use of Agent.
Here’s the scenario:

  • We are using an HTTP action to call the API and retrieve the data.
  • A script task is used to convert the API response (which contains a responseArray with multiple EDIDC and EDID4 objects) into an HTML table to be used as the email body.
  • The script generates the HTML content and stores it in the context variable $.context.htmlTable.

However, we are facing an issue because the data size exceeds the 100 KB limit for the script task in BPA, 
"Script Task" failed
Error message: Execution of task 'script_1' has been stopped while executing the statement [<...], as it reached the time limit

. The API response can contain a large number of records, and converting this into HTML is causing the script to go beyond the allowed limit.

Here is the script we are using

// Step 1: Get the API response
var responseArray = $.context.action_get_getZidocZidoc_1.result.responseArray;
 
// Step 2: Validate response
if (!responseArray || responseArray.length === 0) {
throw new Error("No records found");
}
 
// Step 3: Escape HTML
function escapeHtml(text) {
text = (text === null || text === undefined) ? "" : String(text);
return text.replace(/&/g, "&").replace(/</g, "<").replace(/>/g, ">");
}
 
// Step 4: Build table rows
var rows = "";
for (var i = 0; i < responseArray.length; i++) {
var edidc = responseArray[i]["EDIDC"] || {};
rows += "<tr>" +
"<td>" + escapeHtml(edidc["DOCNUM"]) + "</td>" +
"<td>" + escapeHtml(edidc["IDOCTP"]) + "</td>" +
"<td>" + escapeHtml(edidc["MESTYP"]) + "</td>" +
"<td>" + escapeHtml(edidc["CREDAT"]) + "</td>" +
"<td>" + escapeHtml(edidc["SNDPRN"]) + "</td>" +
"<td>" + escapeHtml(edidc["RCVPRN"]) + "</td>" +
"<td>" + escapeHtml(edidc["STATUS"]) + "</td>" +
"</tr>";
}
 
// Step 5: Final table
var html = "<h3>IDOC Report</h3>" +
"<table border='1' cellpadding='5' cellspacing='0'>" +
"<tr><th>DOCNUM</th><th>IDOCTP</th><th>MESTYP</th><th>CREDAT</th><th>SNDPRN</th><th>RCVPRN</th><th>STATUS</th></tr>" +
rows +
"</table>";
 
// Step 6: Store in context
$.context.htmlTable = html;



Could you please suggest a solution or workaround to handle this limit exceeded error? Some ideas we are considering include:

  • Splitting the data into smaller chunks and processing them in multiple script tasks.
  • Using an external service to generate the HTML and call it via an action.
  • Any other best practices or standard approaches in BPA for handling large datasets in script tasks.

    Any guidance or examples would be greatly appreciated. Thank you!

entry.title: How to download a file from SFTP Server in Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
Requirement:- Pick the file from SFTP server and create a sales order ion SAP

Issue:- We are not able to access/download the file from the server although we are able to access the server.

Can someone please help here what we are missing?

entry.title: Fetch table content from a webpage in sap build process automation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Need your expert's suggestion,

I’m building an automation in sap build process automation that needs to pull the exchange‑rate table from our bank’s website and update those rates into SAP S/4HANA.

Bank is not providing any API to fetch exchange rate.

As of now, I am using "Execute Command" to open a website and using keystroke to select the content of webpage.

Now I have to fetch exchange rate table from bank website and update the same in S/4 Hana, I tried multiple possible way like custom script, but somehow, I am not able to fetch the information. Kindly help.

entry.title: Error during deploy
entry.content: In SAP Build, when I try to deploy, I get a "deployment request time-out" error. Is anyone else facing the same issue?

entry.title: Use Multiple Events(Create, Update, Delete) in a single Workflow using Build Process Automation
entry.content: Hi, I am trying to create one workflow using Build Process Automation in BTP cockpit using Event as a Trigger. It's allowing me to add only one event in the start trigger. We have a requirement to trigger the workflow when a Material is created/updated/deleted. Is there any option to add all the three events as start trigger in a single workflow?

entry.title: BPA : Maintaining Approver Team Members and Selection
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are working on implementation of a standard BPA Template Fixed Asset Write off Approval.

We have a query regarding the optimized way to maintain Approval ids.

As per the requirement, the number of “Approval Levels” and “Approver Group” in each Level will be decided based on the Net Amount and Disposal Category.

We have designed the Decision Table accordingly to select the Approver Group.

But, we want to ensure that maintenance of users in approver groups can be done without need to touch the BPA object repeatedly.

As we understand, Decision table cannot be maintained directly in non-development environments.

We are exploring following methods and would like to highlight the challenges we are facing in implementing them,

  1. Cloud Identity Service,
    • How it will work:
      1.  We can Create Groups and maintain the users in each group  
    •  
    •  Challenges:
      1. Is it possible to create multiple variants of groups based on attributes like Country or Company Code?
      2. If we can, how to filter it in run time based on the actual data being processed in an instance?
      3. Can we use Group for sending only information Email Notifications to outlook (It only accepts mail id and no Group input available)?
  2. Responsibility Management,
    • How it will work :
      1.       A team is created containing Team members and each member is assigned an approver group
      2.       Attributes are added to team, which will help to select the team to be used based on country / company code  
    • Challenges:
      1.       Need to make API call to get Responsibility Management data
      2.       It is primarily designed for workflows on S/4, is it ok to use it with BPA application?
  3. Process Flexibility Cockpit,
    1. Is it possible to use it with BPA?
    2. If yes, can it be used to maintain the Decision Table directly?

 

Sharing an example of possible Approver Levels and corresponding Approver Groups for Single Country for your refence,

 

Value

Approval levels and Groups

(A : Approval Task, N : Only Notification)

< €500k

No Approval required

≥ €500k

1) APG1 (A), 2) APG2 (N)

≥€500k ≥€2 M

1) APG1 (A), 2) APG2 (N), 3) APG3 (A)

≥€2 M 

1) APG1 (A), 2) APG2 (N), 3) APG3 (A), 4) APG4 (N)

 

Thanks,

Nitin

entry.title: How to handle the life-cycle of flows for different environment?
entry.content:
Hi,

I have created a flow in Sap Build Process Automation.
I have created three environments in Sap Build Process Automation , dev, test and production.
I deployed my "1.0" flow to the test, tested it and then deployed to the production environment.

Now I need to work on new features for the flow, so I make changes, release a new version for the flow with the changes, make some more changes and deploy to the test environment to test it etc...
All the while the 1.0 is deployed on the prod environment.
Lets say that now im told there is a bug in the 1.0 flow.

How do i now, after creating many new versions based on the 1.0 flow, go back to working on the 1.0 without deleting all the changes i have added for the new features?

What is the best practice way to handle such a situation?

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation – Email Task Not Rendering HTML Content
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I’m currently working on a project using SAP Build Process Automation (BPA) where one of the steps involves sending an email with formatted data retrieved from an API.

To generate a well-structured email, I created an HTML table from the API response inside a Script Task and passed it to the Send Email task using the emailBody field. However, I noticed that:

The Email Task in BPA does not support HTML rendering.
As a result, the email recipient receives the raw HTML code as plain text — all the <table>, <tr>, <td> tags are visible in the message instead of a formatted table.

Example of What I See in the Email:

 

<table>
<tr><td>Item</td><td>Quantity</td></tr>
<tr><td>ABC</td><td>10</td></tr>
</table>

Instead of this being rendered as an actual table, the entire string is sent as-is in the email body.

Questions: 
1 : Is there any supported method to send HTML-formatted content via the Email Task in BPA?
2: Are there any plans from SAP to allow email attachments or HTML rendering in future releases? Without using Agent.
Any help, insight, or recommendations are appreciated!

Thanks

entry.title: Excel pop-up window not recognized during BPA scenario on virtual machine
entry.content:
Hi experts, my scenario fails during actions below, but only when I am disconnected or vm is minimalized. During saving excel file from SAP gui, there are two pop up windows as per attached printscreens. When checking traces it looks like it goes through and clicks Yes on first pop-up and Close on second one, but actually first pop-up is still open when reconnected to VM. So for some reason they are not recognized. I tried with Click and also Click Sync (because click sync was recorded by recorder). Non of these helped. Any other ideas? Thank you.

First pop-up:

 

Second pop-up:

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation.ERROR_MSG_NO_METADATA when executing a form in SAP Build
entry.content:
I'm working on a student admission process built in SAP Build Process Automation, and I'm running into a metadata issue when the workflow gets triggered.

In the inbox, I get an error that says: ERROR_MSG_NO_METADATA, and the instance goes straight into ERRONEOUS status. I suspect the form was originally deployed in a public environment that's now deprecated.

Has anyone faced something similar? What’s the best way to recover the workflow or rebuild it so I can deploy in a shared environment without losing the design?

Thanks ! Any tips would be appreciated

entry.title: Urgent: Deployment fails in SAP Build Process Automation (SAP_IPA_13049 / SAP_IPA_13127 – Artifactor
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

we're currently facing a critical issue deploying one of our SAP Build Process Automation projects to the Public Environment. While saving and releasing works fine, the deployment fails with the following error:

Artifactory connector failed with status 500 and message: Received server error from runtime system with status text: Internal Server Error and status code 500
Error code: SAP_IPA_13049 / SAP_IPA_13127

This only happens with this specific project — other projects deploy just fine in the same subaccount. We’ve tested in both Chrome and Edge, and even across two environments (DEV/Q and PROD). All result in the same error.

We also removed the Fiori app trigger from the process (just in case it was related), but the error persists. No recent changes were made to the project before this started happening.

Has anyone seen this before or knows what could be causing it? It’s currently blocking us from delivering a time-critical workflow, so any quick help or guidance would be greatly appreciated.

Errors:

Thanks in advance!
Burak

entry.title: Trigger as a new job subautomation is not being executed until the first automation finish
entry.content:
We create a atomation to process many Account documents, more then 500 k. Because this we should be use a paralell process in 5 or more virtual machines.

For this we call an API, to get the Account documents, in blocks with 50 documents. And for each block we start a new SubAutomation to process then, with the flag "Triggered as a new job". Like we can see bellow:

On the execution, until principal automation still Running. All the new Jobs are create Blocked and don't starts a execution in another Agent available.

 

We using a shared enviroment with 2 avaiable Agent to process.

We alread check the Agent versions and the Attributes for Distribution. All this is right.

 

Any ideas about the why New Jobs don't starts to process ?

 

Thanks for yor time !
